programmes.show_description: Faria Khan hated her husband, Nawajid. Instead of divorce, she hired a group to execute a calculated, cold-blooded murder plot. S3, Ep3
A manager taking a gamble with an NHS credit card; and a dance troupe boss steals thousands of pounds. S2, Ep6
Hannegret Donnelly secretly abused her husband for years in Buckinghamshire. He was found dead with 78 injuries, exposing the systematic domestic cruelty. S3, Ep10
Eddie Mosley had a prolific criminal history, but believed he was not doing anything wrong. Join Dr Bryanna Fox as she examines Mosley's descent to being a serial killer. S1, Ep3
Investigators turn to forensic evidence, when CCTV footage of a convenience store murder proves too fuzzy to be of any use. S5, Ep14
A friendship is unravelling. Then, on November 25th, the situation comes to a climax when 20-year-old Sylvilla Humphrey shoots 25-year-old Ercell Minix in the neck. S4, Ep9
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S4, Ep7/20
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S4, Ep8/20
Put the pleasure back into shopping from the comfort of your home and choose from a selection of innovative products.
The Judge reads a woman the riot act when she allegedly uses the family court system to evict a tenant by means of a questionable restraining order. S22, Ep168
When a German Shepherd puppy dies, pet owners blame the breeder; the Judge investigates allegations of parvo running rampant in the litter. S22, Ep169
A man denies having intimate relations with a woman; she claims he lived with her for two months and assaulted her daughter. S22, Ep170
A woman goes after her estranged daughter-in-law for thousands in unpaid loans; she is met with rage over an allegedly deadbeat husband. S22, Ep171
Afraid that her intoxicated friend was about to be raped, a woman claims she pushed through an already broken window to rescue her; she is sued for breaking the window. S16, Ep30
Accused of being a crook after allegedly selling a $500 rug for $7500, a carpet shop owner denies all charges and insists the married couple was satisfied at the time of their purchase. S16, Ep31
A teenager accuses a teacher of punching him in the chest during an incident at school; the teacher countersues for attorney fees and punitive damages. S16, Ep32
Teenagers brawl in a parking lot and the police are called in; damages from alleged kicking, spitting on and keying cars are disputed. S16, Ep33
Ex-lovers who met on Tinder fight over the termination of an alleged pregnancy which ends in a car crash. S24, Ep52
Neighbours fight over the mauling of a small dog, allegedly false police reports and harassment. S24, Ep53
A man's Goldendoodle never saw it coming when an Akita allegedly attacks. Ironically, the Akita's owner was on his way to receive an award for best pet. S24, Ep54
When a woman comes into money, she offers to help her truck-driving daughter with her bills but still expects to be paid back. S22, Ep203
Police buddies at the shooting range, alleged stalking and slashed tire threats come into play when feuding co-workers fight in the workplace. S22, Ep204
Alleged drunk driving, a puppy custody battle and an hysterical fight to get out of a car come into play. S22, Ep205
A woman sues a man for vet bills after his larger dog allegedly attacked her Yorkie; he claims she is lying about witnessing the attack. S22, Ep206
A young man claims his ex-girlfriend was cheating on him; she says he threatened to post photos of her online. S22, Ep207
A woman claims she paid thousands for sneakers but demands a refund when the shoebox that arrives is allegedly empty. S22, Ep208
A young man's defence for allegedly damaging a teenager's phone with a laser beam is that he's a redneck and that's what he does for fun. S22, Ep209
After drinking half a bottle of vodka, a man is accused of slapping his girlfriend and destroying her belongings; he claims she attacked him. S18, Ep5
A man sues his ex-boyfriend's sister-in-law for falsely accusing him of burglarizing her home. S18, Ep6
A woman accused of being a retaliatory nuisance is arrested by cops despite her confinement to a wheelchair; she denies all charges. S18, Ep7
A convenience store owner is accused of attacking a man with a baseball bat; the man is accused of being a panhandler and a thief. S18, Ep8
Nurse Victorino Chua betrayed his oath, secretly poisoning hospital patients in Greater Manchester by contaminating saline drips with lethal insulin. S3, Ep4
A nurse rips off the NHS for thousands of pounds; and a boss of recycling company steals two million pounds of public cash. S2, Ep7
Robert 'Bobby' Joe Long murdered at least ten women in an eight-month period. Join Psychological Criminologist, Dr Bryanna Fox, as she delves into victimisation. S1, Ep4
In the US, a murder in a garage is recorded on camera while police pursue their suspect to the Mexican border. In the UK, a woman is found in her bedroom stabbed 54 times after a night out. S1, Ep3
Found murdered in a Seattle garage in July 1967, Susan Galvin remained without justice until 2018, when DNA and genetic genealogy identified her killer, Frank Wypych. S6, Ep6
Nurse Victorino Chua betrayed his oath, secretly poisoning hospital patients in Greater Manchester by contaminating saline drips with lethal insulin. S3, Ep4
A nurse rips off the NHS for thousands of pounds; and a boss of recycling company steals two million pounds of public cash. S2, Ep7
In the US, a murder in a garage is recorded on camera while police pursue their suspect to the Mexican border. In the UK, a woman is found in her bedroom stabbed 54 times after a night out. S1, Ep3
Robert 'Bobby' Joe Long murdered at least ten women in an eight-month period. Join Psychological Criminologist, Dr Bryanna Fox, as she delves into victimisation. S1, Ep4
Investigators analyse hair found at a murder scene to pinpoint the perpetrator. S5, Ep7
In separate incidents, Britney Gulley and her friend Jeremisha Adams murder two men in cold blood and blind another with a shotgun blast to the face. S4, Ep10
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S4, Ep9/20
A team of British rowers' journey nearly ends in tragedy as their boat begins to sink. S4, Ep10/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A teenager accused of stealing thousands from his grandmother's safety deposit box, says his grandfather gave him the lock combination. S22, Ep175
A model's emotional-support French Bulldog is allegedly attacked by a German Shepherd Husky at a fashion shoot. S22, Ep176
A woman claims she never hit a fellow motorist's vehicle but offered to get out of her Tesla and personally microfiber any scratches from it. S22, Ep177
After a mother witnesses her son's violent death, she and her husband struggle to payback alleged loans to a family member. S22, Ep178
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S8, Ep148
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S8, Ep149
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S8, Ep150
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S8, Ep151
A young woman's father and best friend are killed in an accident; she is awarded a 30K settlement that she allegedly squanders on a loan to an ex-lover. S24, Ep55
After a night of drinking, a man is arrested and jailed after a jealous outburst and beat down of an older man he thought was flirting with his date. S24, Ep56
A man starting a family with a teenager offers up his criminal history unprompted; his ex is surprised to discover he was cheating on her. S24, Ep57
A teacher claims she was assaulted by her ex-boyfriend after he came home drunk and allegedly tried to force himself on her. S22, Ep210
A man implies that his ex-fiancée didn't want to lose her disability benefits by marrying him; they fight over livestock and property. S22, Ep211
A man working as an Uber driver full-time is accused of not paying a dime of child support for over a year. S22, Ep212
A man facing financial hardship is forced to move back in with family and rent out his own home; he accuses his tenants of damaging the property. S22, Ep213
A woman claims she discovered that her daughter was part of an alleged criminal ring; she is charged with filing false statements and sues over attorney fees. S22, Ep214
A determined mother is outraged that her ex-friend demands the return of her beloved dog, Molly; he claims she tried to mace him during a fight. S22, Ep215
Wine stains cover a wall after a fight gets physical between lovers; a roommate sues for damages. S22, Ep216
A false restraining order, a custody battle and questionable living conditions for a 7-year-old come into play when unwed parents sue each other. S20, Ep1
A casino jackpot allegedly drives a wedge between two sisters after a $100 loan turns into much more; custody of three TVs get caught in the middle. S20, Ep2
A limo company owner accuses his ex-driver of being negligent after his $200,000 vehicle is damaged; the ex-employee says his driving record is impeccable. S20, Ep3
A woman cries as she dramatically recounts the terror of seeing her Terrier 'Dolly' being viciously attacked by her neighbour's Spanish Bulldog. S20, Ep4
Kylie Dembrey from Berkshire fell for Mark Sinclair, unaware his charm hid a violent abuser. She kept the years of abuse secret, until he tragically murdered her. S3, Ep5
A GP surgery manager has blown NHS cash; and a fraudster cashes in on terror attacks. S2, Ep8
Join Dr Bryanna Fox and her fellow experts as they investigate the behavioural red flags along Oscar Bolin's descent into a killer, whose secrets and crimes involved his own family. S1, Ep5
Sarah Stern had inherited a large sum from her mother, then one day she disappears, and suicide is suspected. S1, Ep3
In October 2003, the San Diego County community was shaken by a tragic discovery: the dismembered legs of a woman were found in a dumpster. S6, Ep7
